meaning: 邦加岛[印度尼西亚西部](在苏门答腊岛和勿里洞岛之间)
examples: In 2007, 42 people were killed when a fire broke out aboard a ferry travelling from Jakarta to Bangka island off the island of Sumatra.
When the boat reached Bangka, he was the first person to jump ashore. There, he knelt and made 108 kowtows to the sea, swearing that he would never set foot on a boat again.
To say that mining is everywhere on Bangka seems an exaggeration until one studies the numbers.
The move was designed, he says, to keep management in closer touch with its mine operations in Bangka and other islands.
Another plus: Kuntoro's decision to shift its headquarters out of Jakarta to Bangka, an island of 500, 000 residents off southern Sumatra where tin has been mined since the 18th century.
